interactions.dialogue: Do you like the way I did my hair today? ^.^

options.response: I knew you would like it! uwu
This is the last time that I show you ANYTHING!! >:(

interactions.dialogue: Why haven't you told your parents about us yet? Do you hate me? :'(

options.dialogue: 'Cause I don't want them to think I'm a gun fucker?
options.response: IS THAT ALL I AM TO!? >:(

options.dialogue: I'll call them right now pookie, don't you worry!
options.response: Aww babe, I knew you really loved me :')
